title: 10 best herbal essential oils for hematuria
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for hematuria are concentrated plant extracts used to alleviate the symptoms of blood in the urine, also known as hematuria. These oils help by reducing inflammation, soothing discomfort, and promoting urinary health. Examples of herbal essential oils that effectively address hematuria include uva ursi, goldenrod, and juniper berry oil, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. By using these oils in a blend or individually, individuals can experience relief from burning sensations during urination, frequency of bathroom trips, and overall discomfort, improving their quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bearberry essential oils helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce swelling in the urinary tract and alleviate discomfort associated with blood in the urine. Its antioxidant-rich composition also prevents oxidative damage to bladder cells, promoting healthy tissue regeneration. Additionally, bearberry's antimicrobial capabilities help combat underlying infections that can contribute to hematuria, making it a natural remedy for relieving symptoms and promoting overall urinary health.
remedy_properties: Astringent property: Bearberry essential oil has astringent properties, which helps to constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding in the urinary tract, thereby alleviating symptoms of hematuria.
Antiseptic property: Bearberry essential oil has antiseptic properties that can help to prevent bacterial infections in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria.

Anti-inflammatory property: Bearberry essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, which can also help to alleviate symptoms of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in tannins, bearberry roots have been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections and reduce inflammation, making them a valuable component in essential oils for hematuria.

Barks: The barks of the bearberry plant contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that help to inhibit bacterial growth and reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, making them effective against hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of fresh arctostaphylos uva ursi leaves and stems, clean thoroughly with distilled water.
Steam distill the harvested plant material in a still for 3 hours at 100°c, collecting the essential oil.
Filter the resulting essential oil through a coffee filter or cheesecloth into a dark glass bottle, discarding any impurities.
Mix 20 drops of the arctostaphylos uva ursi essential oil with 10 milliliters of jojoba oil and store in an amber bottle for later use.
Allow the blended oil to mature for 2 weeks before using it topically or aromatically to help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow essential oils helps with hematuria because it has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the urinary tract, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with blood in the urine. The oil's mucilages also help to coat and protect the bladder lining, making it easier for the body to expel waste and reduce the frequency of bleeding episodes. Additionally, marshmallow essential oils have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria that can exacerbate hematuria, promoting a healthy urinary tract environment.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Herbal marshmallow essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria, making it easier for the body to pass urine without pain or discomfort.

Soothing and calming: Marshmallow essential oil's soothing and calming effects can help to calm the irritated mucous membranes in the urinary tract, reducing irritation and discomfort associated with hematuria, making urination less painful and more comfortable.

Mucilage-forming: Marshmallow essential oil contains mucilage, a thick, protective substance that forms a barrier on the mucous membranes, helping to soothe and protect them from further irritation and damage, which can reduce the occurrence of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Marshmallow roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in soothing urinary tract issues and reducing inflammation associated with hematuria.
Seeds: Marshmallow seeds contain mucilage, a natural thickening agent that can help soothe and protect the lining of the urinary tract, reducing irritation and discomfort caused by hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh marshmallow roots and leaves from a trusted source or cultivate your own supply for future use.
Clean and dry the harvested plant material thoroughly to remove any dirt or excess moisture.
Steam distill the dried marshmallow roots and leaves using a suitable apparatus at 100°c for 4 hours to extract essential oil.
Collect the resulting essential oil and store it in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids at room temperature for up to 6 months.
Mix the althaea officinalis essential oil with a carrier oil such as sweet almond or jojoba oil in a ratio of 3% essential oil to 97% carrier oil for topical application.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Corn essential oils helps with hematuria because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which help to reduce swelling in the urinary tract and alleviate discomfort associated with blood in the urine. The antioxidant properties of corn oil also help to protect the bladder and kidneys from damage caused by free radicals, promoting overall health and well-being. Additionally, corn essential oil has natural astringent properties that can help to constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding, making it a natural remedy for hematuria sufferers.
remedy_properties: Uva Ursi (Arctostaphylos uva-ursi) extract: Has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help reduce bacteria-induced inflammation and infections that can cause hematuria.

Berberis Vulgaris (Barberry) extract: Contains berberine, a compound with antibacterial and antifungal properties, which could help treat underlying urinary tract infections (UTIs) that contribute to hematuria.

Cornus Officinalis (Chinese Cornel) extract: May exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, potentially reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the urinary tract, which can alleviate symptoms of hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, making them effective in reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms associated with hematuria.
Barks: Containing a variety of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antispasmodic properties and help relieve hematuria symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh corn cobs and wash them thoroughly under cold running water for 10 minutes.
Dry the corn cobs in a warm place for 7-10 days, shaking occasionally, until they reach a moisture level below 10%.
Steam distill the dried corn cobs using a steam distillation apparatus at 100°c for 4 hours to extract the essential oil.
Combine the extracted essential oil with 5ml of jojoba oil and stir well; let it sit for 24 hours before use.
Filter the mixture through a coffee filter paper into dark glass bottles, seal tightly, and store in a cool place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Celery essential oils helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce inflammation and congestion in the urinary tract. The oil's natural diuretic properties can also aid in flushing out bacteria and toxins that may be contributing to the condition. Additionally, celery essential oil has been shown to have a calming effect on the bladder and urethra, helping to soothe irritation and discomfort associated with hematuria. Overall, using celery essential oils as part of a holistic treatment plan may help alleviate symptoms and promote overall urinary health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Herbal celery essential oil's anti-inflammatory property helps reduce swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria, making it easier to manage symptoms.
Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties in herbal celery essential oil help protect the kidneys from damage caused by free radicals, which can exacerbate hematuria and other urinary issues.

Astringent: Herbal celery essential oil's astringent property helps constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding, making it effective in treating heavy menstrual flow or bleeding associated with hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, celery roots are known for their anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with hematuria.
Buds: Containing high amounts of antioxidants and polyphenols, celery buds help to soothe and calm the urinary tract, alleviating symptoms of hematuria such as burning sensations.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh apium graveolens leaves and stems at dawn or before sunrise to ensure maximum potency.
Dry the harvested apium graveolens plant material using a food dehydrator on low heat for 6-8 hours.
Crush the dried apium graveolens plant material into small pieces using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Steam distill the crushed apium graveolens plant material in a glass apparatus at 100°c for 2 hours to extract essential oils.
Filter the resulting essential oil from the distillation process through a coffee filter paper or cheesecloth to remove impurities.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal essential oils helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort in the urinary tract. The oil's berberine content also has antimicrobial effects, combating bacterial infections that may contribute to the condition. Additionally, goldenseal's natural antioxidant properties help soothe and calm the bladder lining, reducing irritation and inflammation associated with hematuria. This natural remedy can provide relief from painful urination and frequent trips to the bathroom.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Goldenseal contains berberine, a compound that has anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria.
Antibacterial properties: The berberine in goldenseal also exhibits antibacterial activity, which can help combat infections that may cause hematuria.
Astringent properties: Goldenseal's astringent nature can help constrict blood vessels and reduce bleeding, making it useful for addressing hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of goldenseal contain berberine, a compound that has been traditionally used to treat urinary tract infections and inflammation, making it effective in alleviating symptoms of hematuria.

Rhizomes: The rhizomes of goldenseal are rich in bioactive compounds like berberine and palmatine, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, helping to soothe and protect the urinary tract.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of fresh hydrastis canadensis root material in early spring or fall.
Cleanse the harvested roots by washing them gently with cold water and drying them with a clean towel for 30 minutes.
Steam distill the cleaned roots using 100 grams of roots per liter of distilled water at atmospheric pressure for 4-5 hours.
Collect the essential oil that separates from the distillation mixture after cooling it to room temperature within 2 hours.
Filter and store the resulting hydrastis canadensis essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids, using a 10% dilution ratio in carrier oil for topical application.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle essential oils helps with hematuria because it possesses potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce inflammation and irritation in the urinary tract. The oil's bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and terpenes, work to soothe and calm the bladder lining, reducing bleeding and discomfort associated with hematuria. Additionally, stinging nettle essential oils have been shown to improve overall urinary health by supporting the body's natural defense mechanisms and promoting a healthy balance of uric acid levels in the urine.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Stinging nettle essential oil's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can alleviate discomfort and pain associated with hematuria (blood in the urine).

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant properties of stinging nettle essential oil help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to inflammation and oxidative stress that may exacerbate hematuria.
Uterine tonic properties: Stinging nettle essential oil's uterine tonic properties help soothe and calm the uterus, which can reduce menstrual cramps and spasms that may lead to hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the stinging nettle plant are rich in anti-inflammatory compounds that help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with hematuria.
Buds: The buds of the stinging nettle plant contain antioxidants and flavonoids that can help reduce inflammation and improve overall urinary health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh nettle leaves at dawn or early morning for optimal potency and quality.
Dry the harvested nettle leaves in small batches using a food dehydrator on low heat for 6-8 hours.
Steam distill the dried nettle leaves using a steam distillation apparatus with 1 cup of water per 10 grams of herb for 4 hours.
Filter and separate the essential oil from the distilled water using a separator or cheesecloth, yielding approximately 20% essential oil content.
Transfer the extracted essential oil to dark glass bottles and store in a cool, dark place for up to one year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree essential oils helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which alleviate the discomfort and pain associated with blood in the urine. The oil's antiseptic and antibacterial properties also help to prevent infections that can worsen the condition. Additionally, maidenhair tree essential oil has been shown to have natural diuretic properties, which can help to flush out toxins and excess fluids from the body, reducing the frequency and severity of hematuria episodes.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory effects: The plant's anti-inflammatory compounds may help reduce inflammation in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria.
Antioxidant activity: Adiantum's antioxidant properties could help protect the kidneys and urinary tract from oxidative damage, potentially reducing the risk of hematuria.
Uroprotective effects: Some studies suggest that Adiantum extracts may have a protective effect on the urinary tract mucosa, which could help prevent or reduce hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Maidenhair tree contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and saponins, which help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with hematuria.

Barks: The barks of the Maidenhair tree contain tannins and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing pain and discomfort associated with hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 500 grams of fresh ginkgo biloba leaves from the wild or cultivated sources.
Wash the harvested leaves thoroughly in cold running water to remove dirt and debris.
Blend the washed ginkgo biloba leaves with 2 liters of carrier oil such as olive or sweet almond oil at a ratio of 1:3.
Steep the mixture for 14 days in a dark glass container at room temperature, shaking daily for optimal extraction.
Strain and filter the resulting essential oil using cheesecloth or a coffee filter to remove solids and sediment.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pomegranate essential oils helps with hematuria because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil's active compounds, such as ellagic acid and punicalagins, have been shown to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the urinary tract, which can contribute to hematuria. By reducing inflammation, pomegranate essential oil may help alleviate discomfort and pain associated with blood in the urine, promoting overall urinary health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant activity: Pomegranate's high antioxidant content helps reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can contribute to hematuria (blood in urine).
Anti-inflammatory properties: Pomegranate extract has been shown to decrease inflammation in the urinary tract, which may help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.

Urinary anti-inflammatory and protective effects: Pomegranate juice has been found to reduce the production of inflammatory molecules in the urinary tract, potentially helping to prevent or treat hematuria.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, pomegranate roots are used to create a soothing oil that helps reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of hematuria.
Barks: Containing powerful bioactive compounds, pomegranate bark is used to make an essential oil that acts as a natural anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, promoting urinary tract health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of fresh pomegranate flowers and leaves from the plant.
Dry the harvested material in a warm oven at 60 degrees celsius for 48 hours.
Blend 20 grams of dried pomegranate material with 40 milliliters of carrier oil like sweet almond or coconut oil.
Steep the mixture in a glass jar with a lid for 72 hours in a cool dark place allowing the infusion to occur.
Filter the infused oil through cheesecloth and store it in an amber glass bottle at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ceylon cinnamon essential oils helps with hematuria because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It has been shown to reduce inflammation and swelling in the urinary tract, which can alleviate symptoms such as pain and discomfort associated with hematuria. Additionally, Ceylon cinnamon's antimicrobial properties may help combat bacterial infections that can cause hematuria. By reducing inflammation and fighting infection, Ceylon cinnamon essential oils may help soothe and support the body's natural healing process in cases of hematuria.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Ceylon cinnamon essential oil's anti-inflammatory property can help reduce swelling and discomfort associated with hematuria, making it a potential natural remedy to alleviate symptoms.

Antioxidant: As an antioxidant, Ceylon cinnamon essential oil can help combat oxidative stress caused by excessive urination or blood in the urine, promoting overall urinary tract health and potentially reducing the severity of hematuria.

Natural antimicrobial agent: Ceylon cinnamon essential oil's antimicrobial property can help prevent bacterial growth and infection within the urinary tract, which may be a contributing factor to hematuria.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhizome of the Ceylon cinnamon plant contains cinnamaldehyde, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing pain and inflammation associated with hematuria.
Barks: The barks of the Ceylon cinnamon plant contain cinnamic acid, which has antimicrobial properties that help prevent infections that can exacerbate hematuria.

Seeds: The seeds of the Ceylon cinnamon plant are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cinnamomum verum leaves at dawn or just before sunset for maximum potency and aroma.
Rinse the collected leaves gently with distilled water to remove any dirt or debris from their surface.
Steam distill 100g of fresh cinnamomum verum leaves in a 500ml capacity still for 2-3 hours using 200ml of distilled water.
Filter the obtained oil through a coffee filter paper or cotton cloth to separate the essential oil from any impurities or debris.
Store the resulting cinnamomum verum essential oil in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids at room temperature for up to 6 months or freeze for longer storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric essential oils helps with hematuria because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The oil contains a bioactive compound called curcumin, which has been shown to reduce inflammation in the urinary tract and alleviate symptoms associated with hematuria, such as pain and discomfort. Additionally, turmeric essential oil's natural antibacterial and antifungal properties help combat infections that can cause bleeding in the urine. By promoting a healthy urinary system, turmeric essential oil may help alleviate the frequency and severity of hematuria episodes.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Curcumin has potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce inflammation and irritation in the urinary tract, potentially alleviating symptoms of hematuria.
Antioxidant: Curcumin's antioxidant properties can help protect the kidneys from damage caused by free radicals and oxidative stress, which may contribute to hematuria.
Blood clotting inhibitor: Curcumin has been shown to inhibit platelet aggregation and blood clotting, which may help prevent blood clots that can cause or worsen hematuria.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhizome is the most commonly used part of the turmeric plant, as it contains high concentrations of curcuminoids, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help alleviate symptoms of hematuria.

Barks: The barks of the turmeric plant contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them useful in reducing inflammation and preventing infection associated with hematuria.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality fresh turmeric rhizomes and peel them carefully.
Dry the peeled rhizomes in a warm dry place for at least 48 hours.
Steam distill the dried turmeric rhizomes using water and a clevenger apparatus for 4 hours.
Combine the resulting essential oil with carrier oils such as coconut or olive oil at a ratio of 5% curcuma longa to 95%.
Filter and store the finished essential oil in dark glass bottles protected from light.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hematuria with herbal essential oils is by combining Uva Ursi oil, which has anti-inflammatory properties, with Juniper Berry oil, known for its antiseptic and antibacterial effects. Apply a blend of these oils topically to the affected area 2-3 times a day to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. Additionally, drink plenty of water to help flush out bacteria and toxins from the urinary tract.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hematuria that are treated with herbal essential oils are kidney stones, urinary tract infections (UTIs), and bladder issues. Certain essential oils like juniper berry, uva ursi, and tea tree oil have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms such as burning sensations, urgency, and pain during urination. These oils may also help reduce inflammation and promote healthy urine flow, making them a natural complement to conventional treatment for these conditions.
